content_body:
Unearth a treasure trove of fun at Aska Gem Mining Company in Blue Ridge, GA. This family-friendly gem mining adventure invites enthusiasts of all ages to sift through mining rough and discover colorful gemstones and ancient fossils.

Nestled in the scenic Aska Adventure Area just 2-10 minutes from some of our luxury cabins, their facility provides all the tools you need to pan like a prospector. Whether you’re a seasoned collector or a curious beginner, Aska Gem Mining Company offers an exciting and educational experience that shines as brightly as the gems you’ll take home. Visit for a day of discovery and leave with precious keepsakes and unforgettable memories.
title: Aska Mining Company
